workflow.name: On-Demand Failure Explanation Workflow
workflow.description: Flow FE-09 v1 bat dau tu GET/POST explanation API. TestExecution gateway assemble deterministic failed-case context, LlmAssistant kiem tra cache, build prompt, goi provider, luu audit, cache explanation, va tra ket qua ngay trong request.

architectureOverview.summary: GET chi doc cache explanation da ton tai. POST co the reuse cache hoac generate live. LlmAssistant la primary module, nhung moi data tu TestExecution phai di qua contract gateway. Async queue workflow duoc tri hoan sau v1.
architectureOverview.futureExtension: Neu can async worker sau nay, co the project future implementation tu docs/features/FE-09-acceptance-criteria/FE-09-01 sau khi v1 API da on dinh.

rules: Tra ve ownership + suite/run access context.
Doc detailed run results tu cache cua TestExecution va bubble RUN_RESULTS_EXPIRED neu can.
Assemble test case definition goc bang ITestExecutionReadGatewayService.GetExecutionContextAsync(testSuiteId, null).

ApiDocumentation.usage: Lay endpoint metadata va response schema payload fallback cho 1 endpoint neu endpointId co gia tri.

steps.action: Goi ITestFailureReadGatewayService.GetFailureExplanationContextAsync(...), validate owner = current user, build fingerprint, chi doc cache.
Nhan 200 neu co cache; nhan 404 FAILURE_EXPLANATION_NOT_FOUND neu chua generate.
Load failed-case context qua ITestFailureReadGatewayService, validate owner, load endpoint metadata neu endpointId + apiSpecId co gia tri.
Sanitize context, build fingerprint, check llmassistant.LlmSuggestionCaches theo endpointId + FailureExplanation suggestion type + cacheKey.
Neu miss: build prompt, call provider client, parse structured response, save LlmInteraction, cache serialized explanation, return FailureExplanationModel(source=live).
Return 200 OK voi cached hoac live explanation.
Load suite access context de lay owner/project/specification info.
Load TestRun theo suiteId + runId, validate RedisKey va ResultsExpireAt.
Deserialize TestRunResultModel tu distributed cache. Tim testCaseId va ensure Status == Failed.
Call existing ITestExecutionReadGatewayService.GetExecutionContextAsync(testSuiteId, null) mot lan, sau do filter matching test case definition trong memory.
Return TestFailureExplanationContextDto gom suite/run/access data + test case definition + actual failed result.
Neu audit save fail thi log warning va tiep tuc tra explanation.
Neu cache save fail thi log warning va van tra explanation live.
Neu provider tra invalid payload hoac HTTP failure thi khong ghi cache va bubble controlled application error.

rules: Chi duoc deserialize 1 TestRunResultModel cache payload cho mot request explanation.
Cho v1, duoc phep load full execution context mot lan roi filter testCaseId, vi endpoint la on-demand va khong nam trong hot execution loop.
Chi goi IApiEndpointMetadataService mot lan cho endpointId duoc yeu cau.
GET explanation khong duoc goi live provider.
POST explanation phai check cache truoc khi build prompt.
Cache key phai dua tren sanitized deterministic input.

examples: Ban khong co quyen thao tac test suite nay.
Khong tim thay test case can giai thich trong test run.
Khong tim thay test case definition trong test suite.
TEST_CASE_NOT_FAILED: Chi co the giai thich test case that bai.
RUN_RESULTS_EXPIRED: Chi tiet ket qua da het han luu tru trong cache.
Khong tim thay test run voi ma '{runId}'.
FAILURE_EXPLANATION_NOT_FOUND: Chua co cached explanation cho test case nay.
FAILURE_EXPLANATION_UNAVAILABLE: Khong the tao giai thich loi tu provider hien tai.

qualityGates.name: No Cross-Module DbContext Access
qualityGates.rule: LlmAssistant chi duoc read TestExecution qua ITestFailureReadGatewayService.

qualityGates.name: No New Migrations
qualityGates.rule: FE-09 v1 khong duoc them entity moi, table moi, hoac EF migration moi.

qualityGates.name: No Verdict Mutation
qualityGates.rule: Explanation khong duoc sua FailureReasons, pass/fail, hoac TestRun counters.

qualityGates.name: Sanitized Prompt Only
qualityGates.rule: Headers/body/variables co chua secrets phai duoc mask truoc khi build prompt, save audit, va cache.
